metadata.description: Emergency circumferential compression to reduce pelvic volume and tamponade hemorrhage.
High-energy pelvic ring disruption with instability, hemorrhage, and resuscitation priorities.
Mechanism-based pelvic ring injury classification (APC, LC, VS).
Anterior frame stabilization for unstable pelvic ring injuries during resuscitation or definitive care.
Radiographic pattern with anterior and/or posterior ring disruption indicating mechanical instability.
Life-threatening retroperitoneal bleeding from pelvic ring and venous plexus injury.

decisionPoints.trigger: Hemodynamically unstable patient with pelvic ring injury and suspected pelvic hemorrhage
decisionPoints.action: Activate massive transfusion pathway, pelvic binder, angioembolization discussion, and expedited ring stabilization per attending

decisionPoints.trigger: Unstable pelvic ring pattern with mechanical instability after resuscitation
decisionPoints.action: Apply pelvic binder if not in place; discuss anterior external fixation or definitive stabilization with trauma team and attending
